{{Quote|I served with Clenna when we were both stationed at the Ruac Outpost many, many years ago.|Derembus Sitnalta, in a Rebel Task Force on Alliance Security SecuriDex file on Clenna|<ref name="AIR" />}}
The '''Ruac Outpost''' was a base of the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]<ref name="AIR" /> that was located in<ref name="Planetnamia" /> the [[Ruac system/Legends|Ruac system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Dominus sector/Legends|Dominus sector]].<ref name="EAOC" /> Several [[Standard year/Legends|years]] prior to<ref name="AIR" /> some point in [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]],<ref name="Date">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'' represents a collection of [[in-universe]] reports from "one [[Standard year/Legends|year]] before the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]," which corresponds to [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> the [[Human/Legends|Humans]] [[Derembus Sitnalta]] and [[Clenna]] served together at the Ruac Outpost. Years later, Sitnalta noted their shared service in a personal addendum to a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Task Force on Alliance Security]] [[SecuriDex]] [[Datafile/Legends|datafile]] on Clenna.<ref name="AIR" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Ruac Outpost was mentioned in ''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'', a [[1995]] sourcebook for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="AIR" />
